title: Mekanism:MoreModules
description: Added a few modules (aka units in-game) to Mekanism
body:
# Mekanism:More Modules
Added a few modules (aka units in-game) to [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism)

When you install [Tacz](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero) or [Thirst](https://modrinth.com/mod/thirst-was-taken), there will be more modules

__Note that since the English localizations are all translated through translation software, the meanings may be off!__
